source: Multitask Mixture Embeddings for Large Scale Recommendations

concepts.finding: Multitask mixture embeddings: learn multiple embedding sets for different tasks (engagement, satisfaction, diversity). Weighted mixture of task-specific embeddings used for each recommendation. Each task captures different aspect of user preference. Mixture weights learned per user. Outperforms single-task embeddings and fixed mixtures.
concepts.implication: Multi-aspect keyword embeddings: different embedding dimensions capture different intent facets (informational, transactional, navigational, commercial). Mixture weights express a keyword's intent profile. Multi-task learning improves overall representation quality.
concepts.open_question: How many distinct intent facets (embedding tasks) are sufficient to capture the full range of keyword intents?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Multitask mixture embeddings (learning separate intent-facet embeddings per keyword) produce more nuanced keyword-intent profiles than single-embedding approaches.
